name: Link
goal: Provide a themed anchor with consistent underline, focus ring, external-link, and download affordances.
description: Light wrapper around <a> that owns the underline/hover/focus treatment for the library. Setting external opens the link in a new tab, appends rel=noopener noreferrer for safety, and shows a small ↗ glyph; setting download forwards the attribute to the underlying <a>. The tone attribute switches between the default underlined link and a subtle in-flow link that only shows its underline on hover.

props.name: href
props.description: Destination URL. Falls back to '#' when empty.

props.name: external
props.description: Opens in a new tab with rel=noopener noreferrer and shows a trailing ↗ glyph.

props.name: download
props.description: Optional download filename hint, passed through to the underlying <a>.

props.name: tone
props.description: Visual emphasis — default is underlined blue; subtle is in-flow with hover-only underline.
